title: Cisco's IoT System Architecture Framework
description: A flowchart illustrating the foundational layers of Cisco's IoT architecture as presented in their Press materials, showing the flow of data from connected devices to business applications.
relationships: Devices connect to and send data to the Fog Layer for initial processing
The Fog Layer aggregates and secures data for transport over the Network
The Network transports the filtered data to the Data Center/Cloud for storage and deeper analysis
Applications in the Data Center/Cloud consume the analyzed data to drive business decisions and action
